name: Boots & Kimo's
tagline: Banana macadamia nut pancakes with mac nut sauce — worth the hour wait if you get there by 7:30am.
mustOrder: banana mac nut pancakes ($13–15) — do NOT add butter or syrup, the sauce is everything
parking: Enchanted Lake Shopping Center has shared parking lot
talkStory: Founded by Jesse 'Boots' Maragos and Kimo McVay — Kimo was a legendary Hawaii entertainment manager who managed Don Ho.
insiderTips: Loco moco and fried rice are legit secondary orders. The move: Tue/Wed right at 7:30am opening for walk-in seating.
